name: The Last Commute
description: You took the wrong train home.
sentences: Wrong stop.
No signal.
The platform is empty.
My phone shows the wrong city.
The next train never comes.
Someone sits beside me.
The seat was empty a second ago.
They know my name and my stop.
The tunnel ahead has no lights.
My reflection stayed on the train.
The doors are closing behind me.
There is no exit on this platform.
The timetable shows only my name.
Something is driving the next train.
It has been waiting at my stop.

name: Unread
description: You have one notification. Do not open it.
sentences: One notification.
Unknown sender.
The preview reads: I see you.
Your location is already on.
The camera light is blinking.
You never turned the camera on.
Your contacts list has one new name.
The name is yours but spelled wrong.
It has been reading your messages.
It replied to three of them as you.
Your mother thinks nothing is wrong.
Your partner thinks nothing is wrong.
Everyone thinks nothing is wrong.
You are the only one who knows.
Now it knows that you know.

name: Overnight Shift
description: You are alone in the office. Or you were.
sentences: Lights off.
Just you.
The elevator came up on its own.
No one stepped out.
Your coffee went cold in seconds.
The security feed shows an empty desk.
You are sitting at that desk.
Someone badged in at three in the morning.
The badge number is yours.
You have been home all night.
The printer is printing your name.
Page after page after page.
The last page has tomorrow's date.
And the words: you did not come in.
But something did.

name: Aisle 9
description: The store was supposed to be closing.
sentences: One item.
Quick trip.
The automatic doors won't open again.
The cashier is gone.
Every aisle loops back to aisle nine.
The intercom calls my name softly.
The milk has tomorrow's date already.
My grocery list has items I never wrote.
Someone is shopping one aisle behind me.
They have the exact same cart.
They have the exact same jacket.
They stop when I stop.
I turned around and the aisle was empty.
My cart now has everything on the list.
Including the items I never wrote down.

name: Unit 4B
description: Your neighbor has been very quiet lately.
sentences: New neighbor.
Unit four B.
They moved in without boxes.
Or furniture.
Or sound.
I have never seen them leave.
But I hear them walking at three am.
The footsteps match mine exactly.
My mail keeps ending up at their door.
I knocked once.
My own voice told me to go away.
The building manager has no record of them.
The unit has been vacant for eleven years.
I checked my lease.
My name is listed under unit four B.
